**⚠️ This is a read-only subtree split repository.**

Pull Requests submitted here will be automatically closed. Please submit your PR to the main repository instead:

## 👉 https://github.com/phpmlkit/onnxruntime

This package is automatically synchronized from our monorepo. All development happens in the main repository.

Thank you for understanding!
